name: on transmit_value
title: on transmit_value
description: This handler is called whenever a provided data, event, or field member transmits a value via the CAPL binding.
If the member does not use the CAPL binding, the handler is ignored.

If there are multiple handlers for the same member, the measurement will be aborted. Inside the handler the this expression refers to the value of the member (i.e. it is of type valueHandle <Member type>).
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
